ddls:
CREATE TABLE "player" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., WR, RB) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game occurred */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., POST, PRE) */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season in which the game occurred */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team for the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team for the game */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team" (
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_type" (
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., reception, rush) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the game */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the game */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the game */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_conditions")
)
column_names: Position of the player (e.g., WR, RB)
Round in which the player was drafted
Number of years of professional experience
Status of the player (e.g., active, retired)
Season in which the game occurred
Week of the season in which the game occurred
Final score of the home team
Final score of the away team
City where the team is based
State where the team is based
